ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Reset
ast.target: 重置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the color of the "white" squares.
ast.target: 设置“白”格的颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the color of the "black" squares.
ast.target: 设置“黑”格的颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the color of the "white" pieces.
ast.target: 设置“白”棋的颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the color of the "black" pieces.
ast.target: 设置“黑”棋的颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sets the maximum width of the chess board in pixels. On narrow screens, the board will scale down to fit the viewport.
ast.target: 设置棋盘的最大宽度（像素）。在窄屏幕上，棋盘将按比例缩小以适应视口。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Restore all chessboard customization settings to their default values.
ast.target: 将所有棋盘自定义设置恢复为默认值。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: White square color
ast.target: 白格颜色

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Black square color
ast.target: 黑格颜色

ast.name: setName
ast.source: White pieces color
ast.target: 白棋颜色

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Black pieces color
ast.target: 黑棋颜色

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Chessboard max width (px)
ast.target: 棋盘最大宽度（像素）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Reset to defaults
ast.target: 恢复默认值

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Chessboard settings reset to default values
ast.target: 棋盘设置已重置为默认值

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please enter a valid positive number for the board size.
ast.target: 请输入一个有效的正数作为棋盘尺寸。

ast.source: First move

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid FEN: must contain six space-delimited fields
ast.target: 无效的FEN：必须包含六个以空格分隔的字段

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid FEN: move number must be a positive integer
ast.target: 无效的FEN：回合数必须是正整数

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid FEN: half move counter number must be a non-negative integer
ast.target: 无效的FEN：半回合计数器必须是非负整数

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid FEN: en-passant square is invalid
ast.target: 无效的FEN：吃过路兵格无效

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid FEN: castling availability is invalid
ast.target: 无效的FEN：王车易位权限无效

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid FEN: side-to-move is invalid
ast.target: 无效的FEN：轮到哪方走棋无效

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid FEN: piece data does not contain 8 '/'-delimited rows
ast.target: 无效的FEN：棋子数据不包含8个以'/'分隔的行

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid FEN: piece data is invalid (consecutive number)
ast.target: 无效的FEN：棋子数据无效（连续数字）

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid FEN: piece data is invalid (invalid piece)
ast.target: 无效的FEN：棋子数据无效（无效棋子）

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid FEN: piece data is invalid (too many squares in rank)
ast.target: 无效的FEN：棋子数据无效（横线上的格子数过多）

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid FEN: illegal en-passant square
ast.target: 无效的FEN：非法的吃过路兵格

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid FEN: some pawns are on the edge rows
ast.target: 无效的FEN：一些兵位于边线行
